name: Viridia
startIntroPart1: A pleasure to meet you, friend.
startIntroPart2: Stay out of our lands and we will stay out of yours.
declaringWar: Sincerest apologies, but we would rather not let you win.
attacked: We will have mercy upon your expired empire.
introduction: Let us work together to better both our great empires.
hateNo: We are not agreeing to that!
afterPeace: Thank you for allowing us to return to civilized issues.
tradeRequest: We would like to make a deal
denounced: You must learn not to hate
declaringfriendship: Allow our nations to prosper together rather than falter alone
